payload.long_description: Wall-mounted analog clock with a white circular face, dark (possibly Roman) hour markers and black hands set within a glossy, scalloped dark metallic/reflective frame; the right side of the clock is partially cut off by the crop and shown in perspective. Estimated camera distance ~2.0 m.
